headline: Deutsche Telekom (TMUS) CEO Reportedly Pushes for T-Mobile Merger
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in, according to analysts. On June 16, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) reaffirmed its commitment to shareholder value, with the board approving a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share. The dividend offering translates to an annualized dividend of $4.08 and a dividend yield […]
